name: Dangee Dums Limited
summary: Dangee Dums Limited offers various food products in Gujarat, India. It offers cakes and pastries, designer cakes, chocolates, cupcakes, ice creams, cream rolls, sandwiches, waffles, cookies, khari toasts, and beverages. It operates its stores under the Dangee Dums and Dangee Dums Yums brands. The company sells its products through its 78 operating outlets in Gujarat. Dangee Dums Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
